description: Python script that directly calls yaml.load() without SafeLoader, triggering CVE-2020-1747 arbitrary code execution vulnerability in PyYAML 5.3.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.py directly calls yaml.load(f) without Loader argument in main(), making the arbitrary code execution vulnerability exploitable.

findings.human_justification: yaml.load() is called directly in main() with file input, making the arbitrary code execution vulnerability exploitable via crafted YAML.
